agency_intel: Moody's weights public perception and headlines about the country meaningfully more than S&P or Fitch when considering sovereign upgrades. The qualitative read on international sentiment can move the needle on an upgrade case even when the quantitative scorecard does not yet support it.
Issuers preparing an upgrade case for Moody's should treat news cycle management, international press positioning, and perception-shaping as core prep — not soft factors.
